action.reasoning: Observation: Balanced accuracy improved from 0.6574 to 0.7137 after two-phase training with balanced sampler + mixup, but few-shot accuracy remains low (0.506). Phase2 classifier retraining did not help (overfit). Analysis: Need stronger long-tail method for tail classes. Decision: Implement logit adjustment (subtract tau*log(prior) from true class logit) combined with focal loss (gamma=2) and class weights (effective number). Use stronger mixup (alpha=0.5) and longer training (60 epochs) with cosine annealing. Also add 5-crop TTA in predict.py for final boost. Submit eval after training to measure improvement.
